description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:latest Docker image and define a REPO_NAME variable set to gitlab.com/namespace/project. Add a global before_script that creates the GOPATH src directory for the repository, symlinks the project directory into $GOPATH/src/$REPO_NAME, and changes into that directory. In the test stage define a format job that runs go fmt on all non‑vendor packages, then go vet on the same set, and finally executes go test -cover. In the build stage define a compile job that builds the binary with go build -race -ldflags "-extldflags '-static'" -o $CI_PROJECT_DIR/Tree and publishes the resulting Tree file as an artifact.
